prompt_text:
### Demographics: 59-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); Peripheral artery disease
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Orthopedic fracture (healed)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 70.1 kg; Height 164.5 cm; BMI 25.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 7.7%), FPG (12 months ago 224mg/dL; 9 months ago 199mg/dL; 6 months ago 198mg/dL; 3 months ago 179mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.3kg; 9 months ago 67.9kg; 6 months ago 67.3kg; 3 months ago 65.1kg; current 70.1kg), Height (12 months ago 164.5cm; 9 months ago 164.5cm; 6 months ago 164.5cm; 3 months ago 164.5cm; current 164.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 127mmHg; 3 months ago 127mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 60mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 18U/L), AST (12 months ago 28U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 99mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 100mL/min/1.73m²; current 99mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 69mg/g; 9 months ago 88mg/g; 6 months ago 91mg/g; 3 months ago 83mg/g; current 77mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 82mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 120mg/dL; current 130mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.8g/dL; 6 months ago 15.0g/dL; 3 months ago 15.0g/dL; current 14.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.77 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
